title.en: Taharat HaMishpacha: The Hidden Strength of Jewish Marriage
title.zh: 家庭纯洁律法:犹太婚姻的隐藏力量
title.he: טהרת המשפחה: הכוח הנסתר של הנישואין היהודיים

description: An introduction to the laws of family purity and how the mikvah cycle strengthens the marital bond
target_audience: Couples considering observance, those learning about Orthodox Jewish practice, individuals interested in Jewish marital customs
tone: Educational, respectful, warm, emphasizing spiritual beauty
author: Torah Light Project
